The secondary 'world's biggest' flash carries a Certain/Awake direct confidence — hence outer_action_tempi: ['Certain']. text: Since we launched in 2021, our mission was to make crypto safe and easy to use. Thanks to your incredible support, we've emerged as the world's leading crypto wallet, soaring to the top of the App Store charts and welcoming millions into the world of crypto.

classification.rationale: 'Since we launched in 2021, our mission was to make crypto safe and easy to use. Thanks to your incredible support, we've emerged as the world's leading crypto wallet, soaring to the top of the App Store charts and welcoming millions into the world of crypto.' text: Phantom has become the most dominant crypto wallet in the world, thanks in large part to Solana. With fast, low-cost transactions, and a smooth user experience, we've now become the face of crypto for a whole new generation of users, unencumbered by the the limits of centralized exchanges.

classification.rationale: 'Phantom has become the most dominant crypto wallet in the world, thanks in large part to Solana. With fast, low-cost transactions, and a smooth user experience, we've now become the face of crypto for a whole new generation of users, unencumbered by the limits of centralized exchanges.' The Weight test: 'most dominant… face of crypto… unencumbered by the limits of centralized exchanges' — this carries genuine force-against-resistance: domination is accumulating gravitational mass, and 'unencumbered' positions itself against the weight of an obstacle (centralized exchanges). This is not mere confidence — it is a load-bearing claim of structural force. Stable family (Weight+Space): the intelligent ruler, decisions enacted. Commanding (Stable: Strong+Direct+Sustained) fits: unhedged, space-mapping, weight-bearing. Penetrating aspect (Space-led): maps the competitive terrain. Stress: time (sustained) — a held, non-urgent proclamation of permanent position. Motor: pressing (Strong/Direct/Sustained) → punching (Strong/Direct/Quick). Outer action flashes: 'fast, low-cost transactions… smooth user experience' reads Irradiant (Adream bright lift); 'we've now become' reads Certain (Awake, unhedged moment).

text: Thank you for joining us on this journey—from building the leading wallet on Solana to becoming the go-to app for crypto. Your support has made it all possible. While there's still much to accomplish, we're excited to continue building Phantom into the world's largest and most trusted consumer finance platform.

text: Introducing Phantom Perps

classification.rationale: Three-word product title. Too short to read inner attitude, stress, or motor. No prose carries enough signal to distinguish tempo.

text: We're launching support for perpetual futures (perps) to help democratize access to some of crypto's most liquid and popular markets.

classification.rationale: The framing is outward-reaching and mission-inflected: 'democratize access', 'most liquid and popular markets'. This maps to the Remote family (Space+Flow) under the Altruistic tempo — a principle-driven, outward-looking gesture. Aspect is radiating (Flow-led): the prose opens expansively toward a public good. Pole is free: continuity and openness, no constriction. Motor is light (floating→flicking): the language is buoyant and aspirational, no muscular force. text: Most perps platforms today are designed for pros with complex trading features, which can be hard to navigate for beginners. But with Phantom's intuitive, mobile-first design, you can easily open, close, and manage positions directly within your wallet.

classification.rationale: The copy diagnoses a problem ('designed for pros… hard to navigate for beginners') and offers a direct solution ('you can easily open, close, and manage'). This structural problem→solution movement, with spatial orientation ('mobile-first design', 'directly within your wallet'), reads as Stable family — intelligence applied to decisions. Practical is the dominant tempo: task-oriented, structural, getting-things-done. Aspect is penetrating (Space-led): the prose cuts through the problem to the structural resolution. Stress is time (quick): urgency of removal of friction, action-enabling. Motor pair pressing→punching: the build-up of the contrast ('But with Phantom's…') carries some weight-bearing preparation before the quick-action resolution. The final clause ('directly within your wallet') briefly flashes a Certain (Awake) beat — clean, unhedged settling. Weight test: the problem-framing and contrast do carry some mild force/tension against resistance, enough to read Stable rather than pure Awake.
classification.literary_anchor: Aragorn/the Duke — efficient structural command

text: Perps are a powerful trading tool. But they are not without risks. Leverage lets you control a larger position with a smaller amount of capital. While leverage can amplify potential returns, it can also amplify your potential losses.

classification.rationale: The copy deliberately holds back — balanced acknowledgement of power and risk, symmetrical framing ('can amplify… can also amplify'). This measured containment, withholding enthusiasm, reads as Stable Light: Self-Contained. Aspect is enclosing (Weight-led read on the gravity of the risk warning, but Light — the prose presses inward without muscular force). Stress is flow: the bound quality of the held warning, the emotional restraint. Pole is bound: deliberate containment, nothing released freely. Motor: gliding (Light+Direct+Sustained) suits the flat, even pacing of the disclosure; dabbing flashes in the short declarative sentences ('But they are not without risks'). Weight test: 'powerful' is a descriptor, not force against resistance. The copy actually withholds — that's Light Self-Contained, not Strong Practical.
classification.literary_anchor: Werle (The Wild Duck) — controlled, measured disclosure of risk

text: From Crypto Product to Finance Platform

classification.rationale: Five-word section header. Too short to read inner attitude or motor. The structural framing (From X to Y) hints at a penetrating Stable move, but there is insufficient prose to confirm any tempo.

The prose scans and places — Awake family, Certain tempo. Aspect is penetrating (Space-led): cuts directly to structural evidence. text: What is a crypto wallet?

classification.rationale: Four-word header/question. No prose body to read for inner attitude, aspect, stress, or motor. Genuinely too short for any placement.

text: Most crypto beginners start by opening an account on a crypto exchange like Coinbase. Although exchanges have become the go-to entry point for newcomers to web3, it's crucial to recognize the inherent risks associated with exchange wallets, as they exercise control over your assets.

classification.rationale: The copy holds two registers in tension: a gentle orientation of the newcomer journey ('Most beginners start by…') and a cautionary alerting move ('it's crucial to recognise the inherent risks'). classification.rationale: A clean, unhedged definitional sentence. 'Crypto wallets are software tools that enable users to securely access, manage, and interact…' — this is pure Space-led, Direct, structural orientation. No emotional content, no Weight (no force/exertion), no Flow. Awake 'Certain' (Weightless, Direct) is the canonical fit for a factual definitional placement. text: Self-custodial wallets are the solution to this problem. In self-custodial wallets, you have true ownership of your funds. No third party can access your private key, which means you're responsible for storing and securing it.

classification.rationale: The copy asserts ownership and responsibility with a quiet but settled authority: 'you have true ownership of your funds… you're responsible for storing and securing it.' The tone is contained, non-expansive, slightly inward — Stable 'Self-Contained' (Light+Direct, p. 497) reads well: the character holds the centre without broadcasting. text: What are stablecoins?

text: Common crypto scams and how to avoid them

classification.rationale: Headline only — 6 words. Too short to reliably read inner attitude, stress, or motor. The structure is utilitarian/navigational (Direct), but a bare title cannot be classified meaningfully beyond that.

text: With the increasing number of tokens, apps, and airdrops, there's also a rise in scams aiming to steal them. It appears that almost every other day, there's a new story of someone being fooled into believing they've won a prize or used a legitimate app, only to discover they were on a malicious site and signed a transaction that emptied their wallet's funds.

classification.rationale: The prose narrates an escalating pattern of events ('almost every other day', 'new story', cumulative scene-building) — this is Mobile territory: multi-directional, fragmenting attention across incidents. 'Acknowledged' fits the tone of naming a known, spreading problem — the reader is pulled into awareness of a social phenomenon. classification.rationale: The prose explains the mechanics of a scam step-by-step with clear spatial logic: 'once you click… it directs you… to connect your wallet or approve a transaction.' classification.rationale: The sample walks through a sequential setup procedure ('can also create… signing in… setting… will use… to restore') with calm, methodical Weight+Space presence. text: Your wallet is secured by a 12-word Secret Recovery Phrase. Write it down and store it somewhere safe and offline. It's the only way to restore your wallet on a new device, and anyone who has it can access your funds. Phantom will never ask you for your recovery phrase.

classification.rationale: The prose centres on custody, containment, and security — 'secured by', 'write it down', 'store somewhere safe and offline', 'only way to restore'. This is Stable/Self-Contained: Light+Direct, inward-holding, quietly authoritative. Aspect is enclosing (Weight-led containment logic — the whole paragraph wraps around the single precious object: the recovery phrase). 'Phantom will never ask you for your recovery phrase' flashes Certain (Awake — unhedged, final).
